consumer_electronics.title: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos reportedly wound up on the dark web

channel_news.summary: Streaming is becoming an important part of many retail media networks' growth strategies, as retailers believe that shopper data can help advertisers prove their TV ads lead to sales. This has led to what is reportedly a billion-dollar transaction by Walmart.
